# hyperfluid_secret (Data Source)

Look up an existing secret's metadata by name. The secret value is never returned.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Reference an existing secret by name (metadata only — the value is never read).
data "hyperfluid_secret" "db_password" {
  name = "db-password"
}

output "secret_path" {
  value = data.hyperfluid_secret.db_password.secret_path
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Secret name to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `id` (String) Secret id.
- `secret_path` (String) Platform path of the secret.
- `secret_type` (String) Secret type.
- `tags` (List of String) User-defined tags.
